## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential Chief of Staff role and explore Claire's fit for an operations-focused position at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is considering hiring two roles: one for internal operations and another for external/client-facing operations](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Claire's profile aligns more with the external/client-facing operations role](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly but needs to mature its processes to match its $4M/year revenue](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [A paid engagement or project may be the next step to assess Claire's approach to fwd.digital's challenges](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Operational Needs

  - [Three focus areas: running the business, overall operations, and hiring/HR](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Need to mature processes to match revenue scale](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Challenges in client management, communication, and standardization of processes](https://fathom.video/share/WmVeegJmoneofz_uFPDbhGgeMharDX--?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
